summary: Vertical video. A narrated USCIS recap explaining the Alien Registration Requirement and the new G-325R registration form created after Trump's 'Protecting the American People Against Invasion' executive order. It mixes faded B-roll of Trump signing an order, ARR-branded stock footage (typing, a naturalization-style oath), and infographic text slides citing about 47,000 registrations, ending on a USCIS.gov card. The voiceover delivers an informational policy recap with no music track. On-screen and spoken text includes 'Alien Registration Requirement', 'With almost 47,000 submissions as of April 29, USCIS is extensively promoting public awareness of this requirement and the penalties for non-compliance', and 'USCIS.GOV'.
notable_text: Alien Registration Requirement; With almost 47,000 submissions as of April 29, USCIS is extensively promoting public awareness of this requirement and the penalties for non-compliance; USCIS.GOV
